text:
HAPPY 12th BIRTHDAY to my beautiful Mason. 🤍🥳🎂

How are you already 12?! It feels like just yesterday you were my tiny puppy, and somehow you’ve become the sweetest, funniest, most amazing little boy with the biggest personality.

You make life better. Every single day, you fill it with love, laughter, comfort, and joy. You’ve given me more than you’ll ever know, and I can’t imagine my world without you.

My only birthday wish is that we get many more years together. Please promise me you’ll live until 20. 🥹🙏🏻 I know that’s not a promise you can make, but a girl can dream.

Happy Birthday to my forever baby. I love you more than words could ever say. ❤️🐾

#shihtzusofinstagram #shihtzugram #shihtzu  #shihtzulover
